name: Impossible Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar, peanut butter, and egg until well combined.
2. Roll the mixture into balls about the size of a walnut.
3. Place the balls on a greased cookie sheet.
4. Mash each ball down with a fork.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. Remove from the cookie sheet immediately and allow to cool on a rack.
Makes 16-24 cookies, depending on size.
